name: Paula Postell
ai_summary: Paula Postell has extensive childcare experience from growing up in a household with a daycare center and years of babysitting. She is available part-time Monday through Wednesday (with some Thursday availability) in Fairburn, GA, and employs mediation and procedural adherence to resolve conflicts.

transcripts.q3:
Hello, my name is Paula and I am really excited to possibly work with up kids. A little bit on my background, I grew up in a household, which had a daycare center in the basement with my grandparents. So I grew up helping with the kids teaching with the kids. My Summers, I was a worker at my, the daycare center. So I do have some experience.
 Perience. I also have a long history of babysitting as well. I just love kids. I think that they are so beautiful and just so pure and they are really a true joy to be around. And I am looking for part-time work. So I just thought that this would be the perfect marriage.
transcripts.q4:
I am currently in Fairburn, Georgia.
 That's 30 to 13. Is the zip code? I am willing to travel, but I would like to stay within a 20 to 30 mile radius of that area.
transcripts.q5: I am currently looking for part-time work. I am available Monday through Wednesday, possibly some Thursdays but those are the days that I am mostly available.
transcripts.q6:
When conflict occurs between two children, the most important thing is to get on their level. It's to talk to each child and to get an understanding of what happened. But most importantly, it's to mediate to teach a lesson and to bring the children back together. If possible. Also, to make sure that all adults,
 Are aware of what's going on, follow procedures of the daycare center and bring it to Management's attention as well. In case, parents need to be notified.
transcripts.q7: I would make a great up kid teacher because I am Dependable, I have Dependable Transportation, I love kids. I have experience with daycare centers, and I think it's a great opportunity to teach uplift and set a positive example for the Next Generation.
